subcodes.first_line: O My beloved! Upon thee be My glory and My celestial lights. This Wronged One hath fulfilled His promise, that perchance the faithful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب علیک بهائی و انوار ملکوتی این مظلوم بوعده خود وفا نمود که شاید اهل وفا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
